title: DisplayPing
description: Display every player's ping by their nametag and on tab
body:
**PingDisplay allows users who are not on modded clients to be able to easily see other's ping.​**

**Features:** 
- PingDisplay updates every 10 seconds by default, but this can be edited in the config file
- If a player's ping is over 100, the colour will turn red, indicating high ping.
- Ping is displayed in both tab and next to the player's nametag
\
\
![a](https://i.imgur.com/K4xQvec.png)
\
\
![a](https://i.imgur.com/4JLIJhQ.png)

If you use the TAB (https://modrinth.com/plugin/tab-was-taken) plugin, please use the "TAB_API" version. Otherwise, use the "Regular" version.
